properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord I’m glad I heard when I was just a child The stories of Your love You have for me How You help me find my way, How You listen when I pray And how You died to set my spirit free

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord I’m glad I found the power of Your Word And knew my life would never be the same So I chose to follow You, ever faithful ever true And answered when I heard You call my name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord I am Your Servant, Your humble faithful servant Help me share Your love in all I do and say Walk along beside me, strengthen me and guide me Help me be Your servant everyday

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord I turn to You, to find the peace I need I feel Your presence every where I go And with every step I take, every choice I have to make I know that You would help my faith to grow

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord I know at times, the journey may be hard So help me keep my eyes upon the prize Keep me safely in Your grace, Help me run and win the race And one day live with You in paradise

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Lord I am Your Servant, Your humble faithful servant Help me share Your love in all I do and say Walk along beside me, strengthen me and guide me Help me be Your servant everyday Lord, Help me be Your servant everyday
